nodes.label: ARCH-1 Dependency Rule
nodes.rationale: Outward domain deps couple business rules to volatile detail, so a Neon or TanStack change ripples into core logic.

nodes.label: ARCH-2 Four Layers
nodes.rationale: Mixing layers (e.g. SQL inside a component) destroys testability and breaks ARCH-1.

nodes.label: ARCH-3 Infrastructure Behind Ports
nodes.rationale: Lets the judge/DB be faked in tests and swapped without touching use-cases.

nodes.label: SOLID-5 Dependency Inversion
nodes.rationale: Linchpin of ARCH-1/ARCH-3: high-level policy and low-level detail both depend on abstractions owned by the high-level side.

nodes.label: COMP-1 Compose, Inject, Delegate
nodes.rationale: Inheritance hard-wires a single axis of variation and leaks parent internals; composition keeps SOLID-5 wiring explicit and testable.

nodes.label: COMP-2 Inheritance Only for True is-a
nodes.norm_label: comp-2 inheritance only for true is-a

nodes.label: CMP-4 Acyclic Dependencies
nodes.rationale: Cycles make modules un-testable and un-releasable in isolation; the build/ graph is kept acyclic under NodeNext .js imports.

nodes.label: PRAG-1 YAGNI
nodes.rationale: Speculative generality is dead weight that still must be maintained; anything Deferred in spec/ stays unbuilt until pulled into scope.

nodes.label: PRAG-3 Reuse over Replication (avoid AHA)
nodes.rationale: The wrong abstraction couples unrelated callers and is costly to unwind; extract only on proven duplication (rule of three).

nodes.label: TDD-1 RED: Failing Test First
nodes.rationale: A test that never failed proves nothing.

nodes.label: TDD-2 GREEN: Minimum Code to Pass
nodes.norm_label: tdd-2 green: minimum code to pass

nodes.label: STACK-6 Drizzle ORM in Infrastructure Only
nodes.norm_label: stack-6 drizzle orm in infrastructure only

nodes.label: CMT-3 Cite the Source of Truth

nodes.label: graphify Skill / Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Turns any folder of code/docs/papers/images/video into a persistent, queryable knowledge graph with honest EXTRACTED/INFERRED/AMBIGUOUS audit trail and community detection.

nodes.rationale: Receptive/deterministic passes do not evidence productive ability (receptive != productive thesis).
